text: As I wander through this modern, brightly lit space, I feel a sense of intrigue and anticipation. The stark geometry—glass walls, the orderliness of the fire safety equipment, the surreal blue light—gives me a feeling of stepping into a boundary between the practical here-and-now and a conceptual elsewhere. Approaching the R+D exhibit, I become acutely aware of the human quest for understanding—our drive to research, innovate, and reflect. Surrounded by screens, text, and experimental objects, I feel a mix of curiosity and philosophical awe at our capacity to create meaning in spaces designed for exploration and thought.
